action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time telemetry from the satellite's internal sensors, including orbital parameters, fuel levels, and hardware status.

action_set_definitions.name: stabilize_system
action_set_definitions.description: Enters a safe-mode state to prioritize battery charging via solar arrays and thermal dissipation via radiators. Use this when battery is low or electronics are overheating.

duration_minutes.description: The amount of time to wait for stabilization.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_maneuver
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a propulsion burn to modify orbital altitude or inclination. Automatically handles attitude orientation based on maneuver type.

maneuver_type.description: The orbital parameter to be corrected.

target_value.description: The desired target value (degrees for inclination, km for altitude).

scaling_factor.description: Multiplier for burn magnitude to compensate for propulsion inefficiency. Default is 1.0.

state_description.altitude_km: Current orbital altitude above Earth's mean sea level in kilometers.
state_description.orbital_velocity_kms: Current tangential velocity of the satellite in kilometers per second.
state_description.fuel_remaining_kg: Remaining mass of propellant available for thruster burns.
state_description.battery_level_percent: Current charge level of the satellite's power system (0-100).
state_description.inclination_deg: The angle between the orbital plane and the Earth's equatorial plane.
state_description.orientation_quaternion: The current attitude of the satellite represented as a [w, x, y, z] quaternion.
state_description.thermal_status_celsius: Internal temperature of the critical electronics bus.
